# dump

import "github.com/radiospiel/simple-go/src/dump"

## Index

<a name="Hex"></a>
## func Hex

```go
func Hex[T string | []byte](input T) string
```

Hex returns a hexadecimal dump representation of the input. Each byte is formatted as a two\-character uppercase hex value. Accepts both string and \[\]byte.

<a name="Printable"></a>
## func Printable

```go
func Printable[T string | []byte](input T) string
```

Printable returns a character dump representation of the input. Printable ASCII characters \(0x20\-0x7E\) are shown as\-is, non\-printable characters are shown as ".". Accepts both string and \[\]byte.
